videos.title: Tripo 3.0 AI: I 3D Printed My Heart with AI (Tripo 3.0 Review)
videos.description:
Tripo 3.0 - AI for 3D Printing and Modeling. A powerful tool for using AI in 3D printing for hobbyists and professionals.

A big thanks to Tripo 3.0 for sponsoring this video! As always, all opinions

videos.title: OrcaSlicer 2.3.1 Beta: Unlocking Stronger Prints with New Solid Infill Layers Feature
videos.description:
In this video, I take a first look at the latest OrcaSlicer 2.3.1 beta release. Join me as I explore the awesome new features designed to give you more power and control over your 3D prints.
